tool_input.command:
python -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; from collections import Counter; base=Path('memory/long_term'); files=list(base.iterdir()); print(base.resolve()); print(len(files)); c=Counter();
for p in files:
    n=p.name
    if n=='index.json': c['index.json']+=1
    elif n=='index.pending.json': c['index.pending.json']+=1
    elif n.startswith('index.') and n.endswith('.tmp'): c['index.*.tmp']+=1
    elif '.corrupt_' in n and n.endswith('.bak'): c['corrupt bak']+=1
    elif n.startswith('memory_item_') and p.suffix=='.json': c['memory_item json']+=1
    elif n.startswith('summary_') and p.suffix=='.json': c['summary json']+=1
    else: c['other']+=1
print(c)
print([p.name for p in files if not (p.name=='index.json' or (p.name.startswith('memory_item_') and p.suffix=='.json') or (p.name.startswith('summary_') and p.suffix=='.json'))][:50])"
